title: Rules and regulations of Department of Corrections
doc_html:
§1136.  Rules and regulations of Department of Corrections

The Department of Corrections shall adopt all regulations it deems essential to the proper conduct of community rehabilitation centers.  

Added by Acts 1970, No. 441, §1.
